message:
feat(fusion): add adaptive fusion reset method, re-export public API, and extend ops screens

- Add AdaptiveFusion::reset() to clear all learned parameters back to
  priors, enabling clean-slate retraining without reconstructing the
  entire fusion pipeline
- Re-export adaptive module and its public types from fusion crate root
  (AdaptiveConfig, AdaptiveFusion, AdaptiveSnapshot, BlendPosterior,
  EvidenceEvent, KPosterior, SignalSource)
- Add incremental fusion module for streaming/delta updates
- Extend ops crate with data_source module and TUI screen components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//! Ops TUI screen implementations.
+//!
+//! Each screen implements the [`frankensearch_tui::Screen`] trait and
+//! is registered in the [`frankensearch_tui::ScreenRegistry`].
+
+pub mod fleet;
+
+pub use fleet::FleetOverviewScreen;
